chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3736 - وَ مَرَّ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَى جَارِيَةٍ قَدِ اِشْتَرَتْ لَحْماً مِنْ قَصَّابٍ وَ هِيَ تَقُولُ زِدْنِي فَقَالَ لَهُ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ "زِدْهَا فَإِنَّهُ أَعْظَمُ لِلْبَرَكَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3736 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) passed by a bondwoman who had bought meat from a butcher and was asking him to add more.
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said to the butcher: "Give her more, for it brings greater blessings."
